home.subtitle1: Developer with experience in the PHP (Laravel), JavaScript (React, Vue, Node.js), and Python (Django) ecosystems. Specialized in transactional systems architecture, integration of multiple global payment gateways, and deployment on AWS infrastructure with Docker.
home.subtitle2: I have led projects ranging from operational management platforms and accounting systems to assistive hardware solutions and AI automation.
home.subtitle3: I am passionate about solving complex problems and building solutions that have a real impact. My approach combines technical excellence with clear communication, ensuring that every project is not only functional but also scalable and easy to maintain.

api.description: Robust RESTful APIs and backend systems with Node.js, Laravel, or Django. Secure, scalable, and well-documented.

cloud.description: Deployment and infrastructure management on AWS using Docker and CI/CD pipelines. Ensuring reliability and scalability.

timeline_section.title: My Journey
timeline_section.subtitle: The milestones that shaped who I am as a developer.

born.title: Born in Argentina 🇦🇷
born.description: Born in Corral de Bustos, Córdoba, Argentina. From an early age I was drawn to technology, video games, and building things.

first_code.title: First Lines of Code
first_code.description: Discovered programming through game modding and simple scripts. That curiosity quickly became a passion.

started_studying.title: Started a Technical Degree
started_studying.description: Enrolled in a Technical Degree in Systems Analysis, building a solid foundation in programming, databases, and software development.

first_job.title: First Professional Role
first_job.description: Joined BeCode as a Fullstack Developer, working on e-commerce and social platforms with React, Node.js and MySQL.

freelance.title: Going Freelance
freelance.description: Started taking on independent projects — landing pages, management systems, and e-commerce platforms for local businesses.

international.title: International Projects
international.description: Worked with MDAbroad, building transactional platforms used across multiple countries with complex payment gateway integrations.

now.title: Building the Future
now.description: Focused on scalable fullstack solutions, open to exciting new projects and collaborations worldwide.

becode.description: At BeCode I worked as a full stack developer, participating in the development of an e-commerce web app and an Instagram-like mobile app, using React.js, Node.js and MySQL.

byron.description: I developed the landing page and the application for OrdenApp, a comprehensive platform for restaurants that covers both the Backoffice and the Digital Menu.

mdabroad.description: I developed and optimized a transactional platform using PHP and Laravel, managing data persistence with MySQL.

ceacus.description: I developed the companion mobile application for a wearable device (glasses) focused on assisting people with disabilities.

salvatore.description: Design and development of the website for Salvatore Men's Club.

vannay_system.description: Development of a comprehensive client management and corporate accounting system.

corral_plagas.description: Landing page and registration for the International Training Seminar for Pest Control companies.

gildo.description: E-commerce specialized in the sale of boutique wines selected for quality and tradition.

la_feria.description: Promotional platform and access sales system for exclusive +25 events.

juan_carlos.description: Personal portfolio and virtual interactive gallery for visual artist Juan Carlos Mattalia.

sporting.description: Advanced internal system for the comprehensive management of the Sporting Club.

coderhouse.description: 27-week intensive career at Coderhouse covering React, JavaScript, CSS and modern frontend best practices.
